a majority vote of the stockholders of each association voting, in person or by proxy, at a duly authorized stockholders’ meeting; and

children.heading: Procedures
children.label: b Procedures
children.text: The provisions of subsections (b) and (c) of shall apply to associations merged under this section.section 2279c–1 of this title
